title: Auth Me Response DTO
description: 200 body for GET /api/v1/auth/me. JWT-backed sessions expose the session expiry in data.expires_at; API-key and DB fallback responses may omit it.

is_admin.description: Authoritative platform-admin signal. When true, the user has cross-tenant bypass (platform administrator). This field — not role — is the canonical gate for platform-admin checks. Clients MUST consult is_admin for platform-admin decisions; role is a non-authoritative legacy label.

role.description: Non-authoritative for platform-admin gating; consult is_admin. Legacy developer/member label assigned server-side; may be null for SSO-provisioned users. Do not use this field to gate platform-admin access.

onboarding_completed.description: True when tenant owner/admin first-run provisioning is complete, OR when the user explicitly dismisses onboarding via PUT /auth/me settings. Set to False at register, True at SSO provisioning or client-triggered dismiss.

expires_at.description: Session expiry as an ISO-8601 UTC timestamp when the request is backed by JWT claims.

_source.description: Non-production diagnostic marker added by the backend only outside production.

is_tenant_override.description: True when a platform admin is viewing a tenant they are not a member of. Always present; false when not overriding. Clients should warn the admin when this is true (e.g., 'Admin Override: viewing non-member tenant X').

assumed_tenant_id.description: The effective tenant ID being viewed under a platform-admin override. Only present when is_tenant_override is true.

assumed_tenant_name.description: Display name of the assumed tenant. Only present when is_tenant_override is true and a name is available.
